name: Decodable but Not Detectable: A Leakage Fingerprint for Near-OOD Benchmarks
summary: arXiv:2607.19393v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While auditing a perturbation-based OOD detector on a document benchmark, we recorded an AUROC of 0.326 -- well below the 0.5 chance level. The cau...
description: arXiv:2607.19393v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: While auditing a perturbation-based OOD detector on a document benchmark, we recorded an AUROC of 0.326 -- well below the 0.5 chance level. The cause is a benchmark leak: the designated "OOD" class is one the model was trained on, so its examples sit inside the in-distribution fit set and the detector is penalized for correctly ranking them as f...
author: Vishnu Bindu Balachandran
